keyFindings.finding: All 8 mk_code_index MCP tools are CLI-portable through daemon IPC; zero are MCP-only.
The CLI must preserve the daemon/launcher, not replace it, because owner lease, IPC bridge, readiness marker, and idle monitor are part of the runtime safety contract.
Spec-memory architecture transfers, but its Zod codegen path does not; code-index has hand-coded JSON schemas and a narrower validator.
Active migration surface for dual-stack routing is about 51 files / 163 matching lines; broad prose/reference migration is a future MCP-retirement packet.

ruledOutDirections: Full MCP reference migration in this packet
Schema generation copied verbatim from spec-memory Zod tooling
